title: What Will I Learn at USCIS Training Seminars? | USCIS
content:
## What Will I Learn at USCIS Training Seminars?
USCIS offers free training seminars to provide participants with ideas, promising practices, and tools for promoting citizenship education. The seminars will enable participants to build, enhance, and maintain a comprehensive adult citizenship education program. Attendees include adult educators, program directors, volunteers, librarians, community-based organizations, and other immigrant-serving organizations.
- The naturalization process
- Online filing of Form N-400, Application for Naturalization
- Instructional strategies to prepare adult English language learners for the naturalization interview
- Adult learning theory for citizenship education
- Citizenship curriculum design and program development
- Ideas and promising practices with colleagues
- Challenges in the classroom and brainstorm solutions
- Recommendations and concerns with USCIS staff
- With other colleagues from your state and beyond
- With your USCIS Community Relations Officer
- With other USCIS representatives
- With local community-based organizations
- New instructional techniques
- Contact information for USCIS and other professionals in your field
- Information on available USCIS resources
